//1: ARSENAL: the ronutz.com application. This repo IS the deployable
//2: site: a privacy-first, local-compute network/security toolbox PWA.
//3: It is SELF-CONTAINED -- the tool engines live in-house under
//4: src/lib/ and there is no runtime dependency on any external engine.
//5: Code is Apache-2.0; content (Learn articles and copy) is CC BY 4.0.
name: @ronutz/arsenal
description: The ronutz.com application: a privacy-first, local-compute network/security toolbox PWA (Next.js).
author: Rodolfo Nützmann (https://ronutz.com)

scripts.//build-note: build runs next build THEN pagefind. Pagefind indexes the static HTML in out/ to produce the client-side search index. The two steps must run in order.
scripts.build: next build && pagefind --site out && tsx scripts/gen-machine-legible.mts
scripts.prebuild: node scripts/check-lockfile-platforms.mjs && node scripts/check-tool-articles.mjs && node scripts/check-changelog.mjs && node scripts/check-tools-registry.mjs && node scripts/check-vendor-namespace.mjs && node scripts/check-glossary.mjs && node scripts/check-study-guides.mjs && node scripts/check-reading-paths.mjs && node scripts/check-tool-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-user-guide.mjs && node scripts/check-icu-messages.mjs && node scripts/check-css-coverage.mjs && node scripts/check-client-messages.mjs && node scripts/copy-locales.mjs && tsx scripts/gen-og.mts && node scripts/check-og.mjs && tsx scripts/build-openapi.mts && node scripts/gen-api-endpoints.mjs && node scripts/gen-locale-coverage.mjs && node scripts/gen-build-info.mjs

//7: Self-contained: tool engines are in-house under src/lib/; no external engine dependency.
//overrides: postcss pinned to >=8.5.10 to clear GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (XSS in CSS stringify); build-time tooling only.
